queries.question: Tell me about transportation options each city has.
queries.sql: SELECT Transportation_Mode.mode  from City_Transportation_Mode join Transportation_Mode on City_Transportation_Mode.transportation_mode_id = Transportation_Mode.id join City on City_Transportation_Mode.city_id = City.id   GROUP BY City_Transportation_Mode.transportation_mode_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT City_Transportation_Mode.city_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  City)

queries.question: Tell me about transportation options each city has.
queries.sql: select city.name , transportation_mode.mode from City_Transportation_Mode join Transportation_Mode on City_Transportation_Mode.transportation_mode_id = Transportation_Mode.id join City on City_Transportation_Mode.city_id = City.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?mode WHERE {
  ?city_transportation_mode a :City_Transportation_Mode .
  ?transportation_mode a :Transportation_Mode .
  ?city_transportation_mode p:hasTransportation_Mode ?transportation_mode .
  ?city a :City .
  ?city_transportation_mode p:hasCity ?city .
  ?city p:name ?name .
  ?transportation_mode p:type ?mode .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Tell me about transportation options each city has.
